<Heading
  as={"h1"}
  className={"openapi__heading"}
  children={"Get a Signature Request"}
>
</Heading>

<MethodEndpoint
  method={"get"}
  path={"/signature-requests/{SR_ID}"}
  context={"endpoint"}
>
  
</MethodEndpoint>



By using the signature request ID you can fetch a `SignatureRequest`.
